intro: Encyclia almasii, also known as Almas Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which may help in treating various ailments, including wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Encyclia almasii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
